name: 40 Inch Beige Number 1 Balloon for 1st Birthday Decoration, Large Self Inflating Cream Foil Number Balloons 0-9 for Boys Girls, White Sand 1 Helium Balloons for Women Men Party Anniversary Supplies
bullets: 🎉 Beige Number 1 Balloon 🎉 - You will get 1pc 40 inch mylar foil number 1 balloon and 1pc straw. Perfect for 1st 10th 12th 13th 15th 16th 17th 18th 21st birthday or anniversary party decorations supplies.

🎉 Large Size & High Quality 🎉 - This giant 40" mylar white sand number 1 balloon is made of high quality aluminum foil, all the balloons are safe, durable, non-toxic, strong and light. The number foil balloons can be reused. Just fill 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely.

🎉 Easy to Inflate 🎉 - The big cream number 1 foil balloons have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. When filled with helium, the balloons can float in the air; after filling, press the valve of the digital balloon to seal it. It can be reused. Do not throw away after use!

🎉 Repeated Use 🎉 - The ivory number balloons set contains a straw that can be used to deflate the foil balloon, simply insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is completely expelled. After use, it can be folded and stored for reuse.

🎉 Perfect Party Decorations 🎉 - The shiny cream number 1 mylar foil Balloons will impress your relatives and friends at parties, is ideal for boys girls 1st 10th 13th 16th 17th 18th birthday party balloons, as a backdrop or photo props, pool party, men and women 21st wedding anniversary event party, baby shower party, graduation, New Year eve, Halloween or other party decorations supplies.

reviews.name: KB
reviews.title: Great product
reviews.body: These 2 balloons look very nice! Great party decorations and held up all night long! They were still perfectly inflated the next day which was shocking! They were a very pretty gold color and looked super nice.

reviews.name: Ahmed
reviews.title: Bright, Big, and Perfect for a 1st Birthday!
reviews.body: I got this 40-inch rainbow “1” balloon for my baby’s first birthday, and it was such a cute addition to the decorations. The colors are really bright and pretty, and it instantly made the whole setup look more fun and festive. It’s big enough to stand out in photos, which I loved.It was also super easy to blow up — I did it myself without any trouble — and it stayed inflated the entire day…

reviews.name: Tango Talulah
reviews.title: Good value, perfect color
reviews.body: These worked great! They were big and beautiful and easy to inflate. We used them on stage for a birthday gig.

reviews.name: Cindy l.
reviews.title: Perfect Birthday Number 5 Balloon
reviews.body: This large number 5 balloon was perfect for our birthday celebration. The size was impressive and made a beautiful centerpiece for photos and decorations. It added a special touch to the party and looked amazing in pictures.The quality was excellent — the material felt durable, and it inflated easily without any issues. It held the air well throughout the event, staying fully inflated and looking…
